etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic: 兒(兒) (ní) = wooden structure for weaving -> loom
etymology.interpretation: The character 檷 (nǐ, "loom") combines 木(木) (mù, "wood"), indicating the material typically associated with looms, with the phonetic component 兒(兒) (ní) to convey the sound.
